settings.content:
Autofull attaches great importance to everyone's feedback and is committed to building the most cost-effective brand. We created our affiliate program with the purpose of providing a mutually beneficial and win-win platform for everyone!

No matter whether you are a big influencer or not, as long as you have some achievements in your channel, you can join our affiliate program! By placing referral links on your social media pages or websites, you direct potential customers to our website and if they make a purchase, you could earn a generous commission!

Partnerships & Collaborations: verify@autofull.com

settings.title: Who Can Join?
settings.content: Everyone from YouTube personalities, motivated streamers, vloggers, bloggers, social media influencers, and many more!

settings.title: Where can I learn more about Autofull products?
settings.content: You can check the Autofull products on the official site with complete information from the designs and benefits of the product.

settings.title: What about product returns?
settings.content: If a customer returns a product, requests a refund, cancels an order, or if credit card charges are reversed due to dispute or credit card fraud, your account will be debited for any commission earned on that transaction.

settings.title: How to spread the word?
settings.content: Here are the ways: Stay connected. Be a fan of Autofull on Facebook Follow Autofull on Twitter and Instagram Check out the latest Autofull videos on YouTube

settings.title: How do I claim for my Coupon Code?
settings.content: Please email us and require your customized coupon codes for visitors.

settings.title: How do I qualify to be a Autofull Affiliate Partner?
settings.content: Anyone is welcome to apply for the affiliate program, and we review each application carefully and make the final decision of eligibility. Autofull will be working with a limited number of high-quality affiliates.

settings.title: Does joining the affiliate program mean I am sponsored or partnered by Autofull?
settings.content: The affiliate program is meant for allowing our fans to earn commissions from promoting Autofull's products. This doesn't indicate any partnership and sponsorship, nor free products sponsored.

settings.title: FAQ
settings.support_hours: Our customer support is available Monday to Friday: 8am-8:30pm.
